home.title: Home
home.aboutDescription: I work on digital products, APIs and integrations with a focus on technical clarity, reliability and process impact. I am especially interested in software architecture, applied AI, observability and automation that reduces manual work.
home.projectsDescription: Projects that connect product, engineering and operations: web platforms, integrations, automations, messaging and systems designed for scale.

projectCards.title: Think Cloud
projectCards.description: Platform for comparing cloud costs and supporting FinOps decisions. The solution organizes benchmarks and indicators into dashboards, bringing more clarity to technical and commercial analysis.

projectCards.title: Notification System • Swap
projectCards.description: Messaging system built to handle a high volume of events and notifications. The architecture prioritized resilience, asynchronous processing and observability to sustain more than 150 thousand requests per minute.

projectCards.title: Conversational Bots • Alertrack
projectCards.description: Customer service and real-time communication automation through WhatsApp. The flows connect messages, business rules and integrations to reduce manual steps and accelerate operational responses.

projectCards.title: Integrations with n8n
projectCards.description: n8n workflows to automate internal processes, connect APIs, send Slack alerts and classify requests with AI support. The goal is to reduce rework and bring more predictability to operations.

home.buildDescription: Principles I use to make technical decisions with a focus on product, maintenance and system evolution.
home.stackDescription: Technologies I use to build products, integrations, automations and observable systems.
home.exploringDescription: Topics I have been studying and applying to create smarter, more integrated and easier-to-operate products.
home.contactDescription: If you need to build a product, automate processes or evolve an architecture with more clarity and observability, I can help turn the idea into a practical solution.

hero.eyebrow: Full Stack, applied AI and automation
hero.title: Hi, I'm Alef,
skills: I apply AI to real processes.
hero.description: I build products, integrations and automations focused on solving real problems, reducing manual work and creating reliable systems from the first version.
